2603.19532.title: EvidenceRL: Reinforcing Evidence Consistency for Trustworthy Language Models
2603.19532.paper_summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are fluent but prone to hallucinations, producing answers that appear plausible yet are unsupported by available evidence. This failure is especially problematic in high-stakes domains where decisions must be justified by verifiable information. We introduce \textbf{EvidenceRL}, a reinforcement learning framework that enforces evidence adherence during training. EvidenceRL scores candidate responses for grounding (entailment with retrieved evidence and context) and correctness (agreement with reference answers) and optimizes the generator using Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO). We evaluate across two high-stakes domains, cardiac diagnosis and legal reasoning, where EvidenceRL consistently improves evidence grounding and faithfulness without sacrificing task accuracy. On cardiac diagnosis, F1@3 increases from 37.0 to 54.5 on Llama-3.2-3B while grounding ($G_{\max}@3$) rises from 47.6 to 78.2; hallucinations drop nearly 5$\times$ and evidence-supported diagnoses increase from 31.8\% to 61.6\%. On legal reasoning, EvidenceRL raises Faithfulness from 32.8\% to 67.6\% on Llama-3.1-8B, demonstrating consistent behavioral change across domains. Our code is open-sourced at https://github.com/Wizaaard/EvidenceRL.git.
2603.19532.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）流利但容易出現幻覺，產生看似合理但缺乏可用證據支持的答案。這種失敗在需要用可驗證信息來證明決策的高風險領域中特別成問題。我們介紹了\textbf{EvidenceRL}，這是一個強化學習框架，在訓練過程中強制遵循證據。EvidenceRL對候選回應進行基於基礎（與檢索到的證據和上下文的推理）和正確性（與參考答案的一致性）的評分，並使用群體相對政策優化（GRPO）來優化生成器。我們在兩個高風險領域進行評估，心臟診斷和法律推理，在這些領域中，EvidenceRL持續改善證據基礎和忠實性，而不犧牲任務準確性。在心臟診斷中，F1@3從37.0提高到54.5，Llama-3.2-3B的基礎（$G_{\max}@3$）從47.6上升到78.2；幻覺減少近5倍，證據支持的診斷從31.8\%增加到61.6\%。在法律推理中，EvidenceRL將忠實性從32.8\%提高到67.6\%，在Llama-3.1-8B上顯示出跨領域的一致行為變化。我們的代碼已開源於https://github.com/Wizaaard/EvidenceRL.git。
2603.19532.author: J. Ben Tamo et.al.
2603.19532.authors: J. Ben Tamo, Yuxing Lu, Benoit L. Marteau, Micky C. Nnamdi, May D. Wang
